154.reason: [This line incorrectly appends the already advanced currentChar; after the first advance(), currentChar is the next character, but tmp was computed before advancing, so this logic fails to correctly capture two-character operators. Additionally, it doesn't check if the second character actually forms a valid two-character token before appending.]
